title: FRV Announces Strategic Partnership with Envision, a Leader in Total Renewable Energy Solutions, for H2 Cumbuco
content: Fotowatio Renewable Ventures (FRV), part of Jameel Energy, announced today its selection of Envision Energy (â€œEnvisionâ€™) as its strategic partner in green ammonia project in Brazil. Envision has been selected for its leadership and proven expertise across a total renewable energy system, from renewables through to green hydrogen â€“ all orchestrated by AI technology. This agreement will see Envision bringing to H2 Cumbuco â€“ a landmark green ammonia project located in Brazilâ€™s PecÃ©m Port its globally recognized expertise in integrated renewable energy solution, building on its pioneering scalable clean energy models that are modular and replicable across the world. The partnership brings together FRVâ€™s extensive experience in clean energy solutions â€”backed by 3 GW of operational renewable and storage assetsâ€”and Envisionâ€™s AI-integrated total renewable energy system to build an electrolysis facility of up to 500MW and an integrated ammonia plant, which is expected to be operational by 2030 and targeting key markets in Brazil, Europe and Asia.
